notes: Plays flawlessly with no issues found in-game, but doesn't exit properly after quitting.  Running ` pkill -9 -f '[Oo]ne [Ww]ay [Hh]eroics' ` after quitting will allow the processes to terminate, at least with the processes found on my machine. If you're using Steam cloud saves, it'll allow Steam to sync properly.
title: One Way Heroics
